name: Move Active Folder

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **fix:** resolve Obsidian community plugin review feedback (#1)
- **chore:** add lefthook git hooks and CI workflow (#3)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JinmuGo/obsidian-move-active-folder/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: JinmuGo
releases.description:
feat: initial implementation of move-active-folder plugin

- Implemented core logic to move folder of active file
- Added UI with fuzzy suggestion modals
- Added FolderService for logic separation
- Added comprehensive tests
- Configured Biome for linting and formatting
- Added build and versioning scripts
